heading: Group Search Results with Facets
body:
You can use MongoDB Search to run facet queries that group search results
by string, date, or numeric values. You must create an index
with a [facet definition](fts-facet-definition) to use the
[faceted navigation](fts-facet-ref) collector.

To get started, see [How to Use Facets with MongoDB Search](facet-tutorial).
